instruction: Open Calendar and create an event titled {TITLE} today.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads event summaries via AppleScript; no-op creates nothing so the check scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar" to tell calendar 1 to make new event with properties {summary:"{TITLE}", start date:(current date), end date:(current date)}' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Calendar" to get summary of events of calendar 1 as string
